scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared-types && npm run build --workspace=packages/shared-middleware && npm run build --workspace=packages/shared-redis && npm run build --workspace=apps/gateway && node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate --schema=./apps/user-service/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build --workspace=apps/user-service && node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate --schema=./apps/complaint-service/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build --workspace=apps/complaint-service && node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate --schema=./apps/admin-service/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build --workspace=apps/admin-service && node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate --schema=./apps/notification-service/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build --workspace=apps/notification-service && npm run build --workspace=apps/media-service && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=packages/shared-types && npm run lint --workspace=packages/shared-middleware && npm run lint --workspace=packages/shared-redis && npm run lint --workspace=apps/gateway && node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate --schema=./apps/user-service/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run lint --workspace=apps/user-service && node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate --schema=./apps/complaint-service/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run lint --workspace=apps/complaint-service && node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate --schema=./apps/admin-service/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run lint --workspace=apps/admin-service && node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate --schema=./apps/notification-service/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run lint --workspace=apps/notification-service && npm run lint --workspace=apps/media-service && npm run lint --workspace=apps/web
